title: spermacoce phalloides
intro: Spermacoce phalloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the dog vomit or puke plant due to its toxic properties. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce phalloides include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Spermacoce phalloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, but it's essential to use caution and consult with a medical professional before using the plant due to its toxicity.
